content:
[inference]
proxy_size = 518              # long-edge pixels for RAUNE + depth proxy decode
# device = "cuda"             # uncomment to force cpu/cuda; default: auto-detect

[grade]
warmth               = 1.0   # [0.0–2.0]
strength             = 0.8   # LUT/HSL blend [0.0–1.0]
contrast             = 1.0   # ambiance contrast [0.0–1.0]
depth_skip_threshold = 0.005 # MSE keyframe threshold (lower = more keyframes)
depth_max_interval   = 12    # max frames between forced keyframes
fused_batch_size     = 32    # frames per RAUNE+depth inference batch
depth_zones          = 8     # runtime adaptive zones per keyframe (LUT output indexing)
base_lut_zones       = 32    # base LUT zones per scene segment (color science)
scene_threshold      = 0.15  # Wasserstein-1 depth distance to split scene segments [0.0–1.0]
min_segment_keyframes = 3    # merge segments shorter than this into the previous one
zone_smoothing_window = 3    # moving-average window for per-KF zone boundary smoothing
